name: code-clash-mvp
description: Code-Clash Arena of Algorithms - Hackathon MVP

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:server && npm run install:client && npm run install:shared
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo 'Setup complete! Run npm run dev to start'
